summary: The 'test suite' consists solely of a Python helper script (run_tests.py) that installs .NET and invokes `dotnet test` — there are zero actual test files. No C# test classes, no test methods, no assertions, no mocks, no fixtures, and no test project (.csproj) exist at all. None of the requirements (process info reading, CPU/memory filtering, top-N selection, alert report generation, mockable data sources) are exercised in any way. The run_tests.py would immediately fail because the referenced `ProcessMonitor.Tests/ProcessMonitor.Tests.csproj` does not exist. This is not a functional test suite by any measure.
